import re

with open\('4-Game.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Find all top-level function/let/const/var declarations
targets = [
    'function logAssetTrackerStatus',
    'function trackLoadImage',
    'function trackLoadSound',
    'function releaseImageReference',
    'function clearObjectValues',
    'function releaseGameAssets',
    'function scheduleDeferredCharacterAssets',
    'let TILE_IMAGES',
    'let CUSTOM_ASSETS_OFF',
    'let __ASSET_BACKUP',
    'function backupCustomAssets',
    'function removeCustomAssetsRuntime',
    'function restoreCustomAssetsRuntime',
    'function toggleCustomAssetsRuntime',
    'function cleanImageBrown',
]

for t in targets:
    for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\):
        if line.rstrip\(\).startswith\(t\):
            print\(f'{i}: {line.rstrip\(\)[:60]}'\)
            break
")
